About Matthew McAuliffe, MD
Dr. Matthew McAuliffe specializes in preventative and precision medicine as well as regenerative medicine.
His unique program offers a comprehensive, multi-faceted approach to vitality, health, and wellness that is individualized with a personalized treatment plan depending on the conditions a patient is experiencing.
His interest in preventative and precision medicine began when he searched for solutions to his fatigue and decreased focus. Dr. Matthew McAuliffe became a client of a precision medicine program where he developed a strong interest after seeing the results it gave him, not just with improved energy levels and focus but with a significant improvement in his overall health..
He uses an approach involving bioidentical hormone optimization, developing exercises, prescriptions, and nutrition guidance that is tailored to the individual patient’s conditions.
Arizona Performance Medicine has a calling to help patients optimize their health, physical and mental performance, sexual wellness, and longevity while preventing age-related diseases such as metabolic syndrome, diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and dementia.
our patients
what people Are saying About Dr. Matthew McAuliffe & Arizona Performance Medicine
JR
“It took me a while to find a doctor that made me feel comfortable and welcome! Dr. McAuliffe as well as his staff are awesome, they listen and give the best advice. Dr. McAuliffe really strives to give the best care possible to each of her patients. – JR”
CH
“Dr. McAuliffe and the entire staff at APM are beyond amazing. When you have an appointment, they will spend the whole scheduled period with you if need be; I know when I come in to see Dr. Matthew McAuliffe, he’s already reviewed the reasons for my coming in and my file. I never feel rushed, and he always asks if I have any other questions. He’s awesome.”
RB
“Dr. McAuliffe gets it. From his excellent treatment, curiosity, investigative mind and ability to connect, you know where you stand immediately and what next steps look like. Attention doctors if you want a masterclass in watching a doctor bring medical knowledge and build rapport so that message is heard by patient and therefore delivered watch this guy.”

You Are Your Greatest Investment
We are here to listen to your concerns & desires and to offer you the personalized service you deserve. Our highly skilled and professional staff, including Dr. Matthew McAuliffe, will help you feel comfortable discussing any issues you are facing. We will assess your specific condition, symptoms, medical history, and needs, and work to provide you with individualized, medically substantiated, and effective care. Our goal is to help you look and feel your absolute best through our hormone replacement therapy options here in Scottdale, AZ!\n\n[/cs_content_seo][/cs_element_layout_column][/cs_element_layout_row][cs_element_layout_row _id=”5″ ][cs_element_layout_column _id=”6″ ][cs_element_text _id=”7″ ][cs_content_seo]Your sex drive is in the dumper. Maybe your spouse understands. Maybe she doesn’t. You worry. This is not good.
Your waist grows while your strength shrinks. You dress for comfort now, thanks to the weight gain, not for style. Because frankly, your nice clothes are too tight for your body.
You know you need to lose weight, but your energy went the same place your sex drive went: away. You know your spouse notices. For that matter, you know everybody notices. And you hate it.
You no longer sleep through the night. You’re up and down, tossing and turning. You wake up groggy,  grumpy, and unrested, and nothing you do seems to help.
You used to work like a Trojan. You used to party like a rock star. Now you sit at home and watch TV like an old fart.
Things you used to love to do now seem like too much trouble. Your old pleasures drift farther out of reach, and nothing you do seems to bring those pleasures back to you.
Your doctor says, “You’re getting older. This is normal. Learn to accept it.”
You’ve Never Settled for Mediocrity
Most people would just shrug their shoulders, say “ok,” and settle for a life of low-energy mediocrity.
But, you aren’t most people.
You didn’t get to where you are in life by settling for mediocrity.
You’ve never tolerated less than the best, yet now your best seems impossible.
It doesn’t have to be this way.
What If You Could Reverse the Effects of Aging?
Aging is a disease, not an inevitability. And it can be treated.
Our physicians work on the cutting edge of a new era of medicine: Age Management Medicine.
Our goal is to help you maintain optimal health, vigor, and vitality for your entire life.
Our strategy is simple: to delay the onset of age-related disease.
Our tactics are optimized nutrition, optimized exercise, optimized supplements, and optimized hormone levels.
Aging is a Treatable Disease
Many so-called aging issues are really hormonal imbalances. For example, all of these conditions respond positively to hormone therapy regardless of your age:
Weight gain and muscle loss
Reduced energy
Reduced cognition
Memory loss
Poor sleep
Loss of libido
Often, we can alleviate these and many other symptoms by getting your hormonal imbalances under control. Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy can even prevent the onset of most common chronic diseases related to aging, including heart disease, malignancies, dementia, metabolic syndrome and diabetes.
Is Hormone Replacement Therapy Safe?
A large body of research literature confirms that these treatments are safe — without side effects or complications.
As our client in Scottsdale, AZ, you will receive a comprehensive hormone replacement therapy  plan customized to your specific hormone levels and needs. Dr. Matthew McAuliffe and our staff can’t wait to help you.

\n\n[/cs_content_seo][/cs_element_layout_column][cs_element_layout_column _id=”8″ ][cs_element_image _id=”9″ ][cs_element_text _id=”10″ ][cs_content_seo]Cornerstones of an individualized Age Management Healthcare Plan
The cornerstones are:
Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy
When appropriate and indicated by testing and symptoms. These include but are not limited to testosterone, growth hormone, and estrogen.
Exercise
An individualized exercise plan will do wonders for systemic inflammation, weight gain, mood, sleep, sex drive, and energy. In short, you can get your life back.
Supplements
A healthy body needs more than the right fuel; it needs the right minerals, amino acids, and probiotics. We’ll figure out exactly what your body lacks and customize a plan to give your system exactly what it needs.
Nutrition
An individualized nutrition plan that works for you. We’ll teach you which foods to avoid and which foods are best for you, and train you to eat for life, not just for a few weeks.

Dr. Matthew McAuliffe
Book A Free Consultation Call Now!
About Dr. McAuliffe:
Dr. Matthew McAuliffe specializes in preventative and precision medicine as well as regenerative medicine.
His unique program offers a comprehensive, multi-faceted approach to vitality, health, and wellness that is individualized with a personalized treatment plan depending on the conditions a patient is experiencing.
His interest in preventative and precision medicine began when he searched for solutions to his fatigue and decreased focus. Dr. Matthew McAuliffe became a client of a precision medicine program where he developed a strong interest after seeing the results it gave him, not just with improved energy levels and focus but with a significant improvement in his overall health.
He uses an approach involving bioidentical hormone optimization, developing exercises, prescriptions, and nutrition guidance that is tailored to the individual patient’s conditions.
Dr. Matthew McAuliffe completed his undergraduate training at Arizona State University and his medical degree at Pennsylvania State Medical School. Doctor McAuliffe finished residency training in physical medicine and rehabilitation at Thomas Jefferson University Hospital. He furthered his medical training by completing fellowship training in regenerative medicine at The Bodor Clinic in Napa, California.  He is certified in Age Management by the Age Management Medical Group. He then returned home to Arizona following his education. He brought his knowledge of preventative and precision medicine to his practice in Scottsdale, where he serves that general area and all surrounding areas.
When asked about his treatment approach, Dr. Matthew McAuliffe has said, “I enjoy solving complex problems. As a doctor, I enjoy helping clients optimize their health and be the best version of themselves they can be. Too many physicians get stuck in decades-old medical dogma that was never scientifically accurate. I enjoy being on the leading edge of medicine and being a part of the shift away from pharmaceuticals and towards biologics that are identical to what humans have evolved with for tens of thousands of years. To me, it intuitively makes more sense to move down this path, and the science behind the methods is there to prove it works.”
Arizona Performance Medicine has a calling to help patients optimize their health, physical and mental performance, sexual wellness, and longevity while preventing age-related diseases such as metabolic syndrome, diabetes, cardiovascular disease, and dementia.
Contact Us Today!
At Arizona Performance Medicine, Dr. Matthew McAuliffe and our team treat the signs and symptoms of aging. We use cutting-edge alternatives to “normal” treatment options. For example, we use cell-based therapies and adjunctive treatments such as bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and evidence-based anti-aging therapies. If you have any questions, contact us today or schedule a consultation appointment!
